title: improve new item with form support - make button use form

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
I just discovered you can set a form to be an option on the dropdown of the New Item button.

This is excellent. However, if this feature could be taken a step farther and in the board settings allow us to make the form the default (or only) behavior of the New Item button.

It would go a long way to easing adoption, esp. when dealing with sales people who have an aversion to any “complexity”.
